'''Cyrans the Unfeeling''' was usually found near the entrance to the [[Dead Forest (Kashyyyk)|Dead Forest]] in the [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], and, as his name implies, he could not feel, which suggested he was dead.

==Biography==
Cyrans along with his fellow [[Sayormi]] constantly raided the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] settlement of [[Kerritamba Village]] in hopes of eventually eradicating them and taking their home. Although seemingly dead already, he was murdered along with the [[Sayormi Queen]] by an outsider hired by the Wookiee chief [[Kerritamba]].

==Behind the scenes==
Cyrans was a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on December 15, 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
